description_long: This is a lightweight, low-cut casual shoe with a vibrant blue mesh upper and a white rubber sole. The shoe features a standard lace-up closure with matching blue laces threaded through reinforced eyelets. The mesh material appears breathable and flexible, suitable for everyday urban wear. The sole is flat and slightly textured, providing basic grip for walking on sidewalks or pavements. The heel has a small pull tab for easy wearing, and subtle branding is visible on the back. The overall design is simple, functional, and geared toward comfort and casual style.
description: A blue mesh lace-up casual shoe with a white rubber sole, designed for comfort and everyday urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue mesh upper, white sole, and lace-up closure.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, laces, and mesh texture.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the mesh material and sole profile.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the heel tab, subtle branding, and back of the sole.
attribute_logo: Small teardrop-shaped logo on the heel tab, embossed 'allbirds' text on the back of the sole, both in blue.
